name: Cold Lead Rewarm Strategy
tldr: Re-activate 180+ day inactive leads with phased nurture across 9 languages. $100K-$500K revenue impact. April 3 hard deadline - MLT visibility.
executiveSummary: MLT-level initiative to re-activate 180+ day inactive business-email leads through phased 10-email nurture across Digital, SMB, Commercial, and Enterprise segments in 9 regions. Estimated $100K-$500K revenue impact. Hard deadline April 3, 2026. Submission date: March 11, 2026.
managerSnapshot: Execution status: Not Started but planning in progress. April 3 MLT-level hard deadline. 10-email nurture, 9 languages, cross-segment. $100K-$500K pipeline impact. 111 production hours. Ownership clarified: Bernardo owns new program, Thais completing one-off pilot. Coordination with Alex Fong on non-AMER regions.
overview:
Q1'27 Cold Lead Rewarm Nurture: Large-scale campaign (6-10 touchpoints) to re-activate 180+ day inactive business-email leads with phased nurture by segment, region, and language to drive re-engagement and conversions.

Audience: Prospects across Digital, SMB, Commercial, Enterprise segments
Personas: HR, CX, IT
Regions: AMER U.S. English, EMEA UKI English, APAC Japanese, EMEA German, French, Italian, Dutch, Spanish, LATAM Spanish
Campaign Size: 10 total emails
Production Hours: 111 hours
Submission Date: March 11, 2026
Comms Type: Always-on
Campaign Goal: New Business Pipeline
communication:
Stakeholders: Karyn Thompson (owner/requestor), Alex Fong, Bernardo Gómez (owns new program), Thais (completing one-off pilot), Alicia Sullivan

Slack Channel: #cold-lead-rewarm with all key stakeholders and executive buy-in

Asana Discussion (Most Recent - 9 days ago, March 17):
- Alex Fong: Confirmed non-AMER regions/countries for SMB and Digital. Needs audience count and schedule for regional communication to inform regions.
- Bernardo Gómez: Clarified ownership - Bernardo owns the new program, asked if he needs to finish the one-off sending.
- Karyn Thompson: Confirmed Thais is finishing the one-off send, Bernardo will own the new program. Pilot list differs from cold leads - plan is to launch to all cold English leads with filter to exclude 'if member of re-warm'. Pilot and cold lead lists don't fully overlap.

Key decisions:
- Prioritize EN cold leads first (74% engagement potential)
- Use market segment personalization for Digital/SMB (72% engagement)
- April 3 hard deadline - MLT level initiative with high visibility
- Localization required for 9 languages
- Ownership: Bernardo owns new program, Thais finishing pilot
- List management: Launch to all cold English leads, filter out pilot 're-warm' members
impact:
Revenue Impact: $100,000-$500,000 estimated

Expected outcomes:
- Re-engage 180+ day inactive business-email leads
- Drive new business pipeline across all segments (Digital, SMB, Commercial, Enterprise)
- Cross-regional impact: 9 languages/regions
- Support KR: Increase Lead-to-MQL rate to 15% for non-core leads
- Improve Re-MQL rate to 28% for CX program optimizations

MLT visibility and priority - direct impact on Q1'27 funnel growth goals.
risks:
Critical considerations:
- Hard deadline: April 3, 2026 (MLT level visibility)
- Execution status: Not Started - time-sensitive
- Localization dependency: 9 languages must be coordinated
- Ownership transition: Bernardo taking over new program from Thais's pilot
- List overlap: Must filter to exclude 're-warm' members from pilot
- Regional coordination: Need audience counts and schedule for non-AMER regions (Alex Fong waiting)

Next steps:
- Finalize audience counts for regional communication (Alex Fong request - high priority)
- Coordinate with Thais on one-off send completion timeline
- Align with Bernardo on new program ownership and launch plan
- Execute list filtering to avoid pilot overlap
- Begin execution to meet April 3 hard deadline
links:
Asana Ticket: https://app.asana.com/1/8443698280818/project/1209490821798229/task/1213618127475414
Asana Form Submission: https://form.asana.com/?k=NaDdVz6BHEWSibrK4HgVqw&d=8443698280818
Slack: #cold-lead-rewarm
okr:
L1 OKR: Drive new customer growth at every stage of the funnel

Supporting KRs:
KR1: Increase Lead-to-MQL rate of non-core leads to 15%
KR2: Increase Re-MQL rate to 28% for CX program optimizations

Quarter: Q2'26 Submission, Q1'27 Launch

history.update: Asana ticket review: Execution status 'Not Started' with April 3 hard deadline. Recent activity (March 17): Alex Fong requesting audience counts for non-AMER regions. Ownership clarified - Bernardo owns new program, Thais completing pilot. Strategy confirmed to launch to all cold English leads with filter excluding pilot 're-warm' members. Lists don't fully overlap.
